indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_permissions_pkey ON public.user_permissions USING btree (user_id, permission_id)
indexes.name: user_permissions_pkey

indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_pkey ON public.users USING btree (id)
indexes.name: users_pkey

unique_and_check_constraints.definition: ((((last_sequence = 0) AND (last_event_hash IS NULL)) OR ((last_sequence > 0) AND (last_event_hash IS NOT NULL))))
